body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
~~Previously we negated precipitation/moisture flux when converting to salinity flux. Based on the sign conventions used by ClimaAtmos/SurfaceFluxes/Oceananigans, this was wrong.~~ See the discussion in #1378 for more details.

This PR documents the sign conventions of flux exchanges in the relevant docstrings, so future users/maintainers can understand and verify sign correctness.

Closes #1378
title: document flux sign conventions
